body:
## Problem

The 'lick 100% milestone' (all 63 drummers have lick pages) was declared complete, but **8 drummer lick LLM markdown files are missing** from `public/llms/licks/` and their URLs are absent from the sitemap hardcoded lick array (ends at line 549, `api/sitemap.js`). AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot) cannot discover these drummer licks.

**Missing files (confirmed by `ls public/llms/licks/` vs `ls packages/frontend/data/licks/`):**
- `jocke-wallgren.md`
- `john-otto.md`
- `jon-dette.md`
- `kevin-talley.md`
- `morgan-agren.md`
- `nick-augusto.md`
- `ryan-van-poederooyen.md`
- `tim-yeung.md`

All 8 have lick data in `packages/frontend/data/licks/<slug>.js` but no corresponding LLM markdown file.

## Fix

**Step 1 — Generate 8 LLM markdown files:**
Pattern: mirror the existing files in `public/llms/licks/`. Use the lick data from `packages/frontend/data/licks/<slug>.js` (songs, techniques, notes fields) to generate a structured markdown file per drummer:
```
# <Drummer Name> — Signature Licks
**Drummer:** <name>
**Band:** <band>
...lick descriptions...
```

Output to: `public/llms/licks/<slug>.md` (8 new files)

**Step 2 — Add 8 slugs to sitemap:**
File: `api/sitemap.js` — find the hardcoded licks LLM array (currently ends at line 549 with `'chris-turner', 'isaac-lamb'`) and append:
```js
// Batch 3 — remaining 8 drummers added after 100% lick milestone
'jocke-wallgren', 'john-otto', 'jon-dette', 'kevin-talley',
'morgan-agren', 'nick-augusto', 'ryan-van-poederooyen', 'tim-yeung',
```

## Pages affected
- 8 new `/llms/licks/<slug>.md` static endpoints
- 8 new sitemap entries at priority 0.5

## Quality gate
- Each file ≥ 200 words
- 3+ lick entries per drummer with technique description
- Consistent format with existing `public/llms/licks/joey-jordison.md`

## Estimated uplift
Closes the AI-citation gap for 8 roster drummers (Jocke Wallgren, John Otto, Jon Dette, Kevin Talley, Morgan Ågren, Nick Augusto, Ryan Van Poederooyen, Tim Yeung). Compounds with their approved article proposals (#1479, #1484, #1516, #1518, #1515, #1483, #1517, #1456) already in the ai-fix queue.

## GSC query bucket served
'[drummer] drum licks', '[drummer] signature drum pattern' — AI-citation long-tail.

## Verify
1. `ls public/llms/licks/` shows 63 .md files (55 → 63)
2. `curl https://metalforge.io/llms/licks/jocke-wallgren.md` returns 200 with content
3. `curl https://metalforge.io/sitemap.xml | grep jocke-wallgren` returns a URL entry
4. Google Rich Results Test on any of the 8 pages shows no errors
5. File format matches `public/llms/licks/joey-jordison.md` structure

## Done
All 8 `/llms/licks/<slug>.md` files created in `public/llms/licks/` AND 8 slugs added to sitemap array in `api/sitemap.js`.
title: SEO batch: /llms/licks/ — 8 missing drummer LLM markdown files + sitemap entries (~8 files)
